title: Luxury Auto Showroom
overview: Brand-aligned showroom with display lighting, customer lounge, and back-of-house service zones.
brief: An automotive brand needed a showroom that puts product on a pedestal — controlled display lighting, a calm customer lounge, and back-of-house flows that do not interrupt the sales journey.
approach: Display lighting was designed before ceiling grid lock-in. Durable floor finishes and service routes were resolved early so launch-critical civil works could run in parallel with joinery.

execution.details: Launch-critical schedule with parallel civil and services works.

outcome.summary: Showroom opened for a brand launch date with display lighting commissioned and signed off in a single client walkthrough.

processStrip.label: Site
processStrip.alt: Auto showroom — services and ceiling works
